item.title: Let’s see what happens
item.description: Leaving this here to see how well it ages in the next 4 years. Prices from local market in Oregon FP Edit: Never gone viral before this is cool, thank you all! These prices are from our local family owned neighborhood market. It is undoubtedly cheaper to do the bulk of our family’s shopping at the chain stores but this place is close and convenient to pick up a few things . They also seem to be more sensitive to big price swings and thus might provide a more accurate measure of increasing costs compared to the big chain stores. I will try to update will weights if I get the time. Just wanted to have empirical evidence in case the mouth breathing red hats try to defend their messiah when he inevitably skyrockets prices.
item.dc:creator: noxidalliance

item.title: Images of Note: Bruh City
item.description:
EVERYTHING IS GOING TO BE OKAY AND THAT IS A THREAT!
Suddenly Revelation is not as big a pile of shit.
smol
This sounds like the opening to an award winning podcast.
me irl fr fr
Business idea: "Ultra realistic looking" testicle earrings.
Humans: Brutalism Hobbits: Arts and Crafts
I need to use "none of these words are in the bible" more often
I have never had or even seen a corndog. They're just not a thing here.
Most Glaswegian sentence
yeah basically me and many others when 1.6 dropped
https://signal.org/
https://signal.org/
https://signal.org/ no seriously, get signal and encourage everyone else to as well, especially if you are a minority in America.
HELL YEAH
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky Do not ask for whom the caramell dansens, it dansens for thee.

item.title: Dumping Memes on a Sunday evening
item.description:
OMG these commercials are so annoying
Me, daily at work...
Me vs my wife
A lot of social media users need to understand the differences, 99% of you are not getting gaslighted.
Or being played in your local grocery store...
I have taken to calling people fornicators, it's not as rude as the other f word, but still gets people's attention.
"To me, it underscores our responsibility to deal more kindly with one another" - Carl Sagan
Gus Tax Enjoy your weekend Imgur, thank a veteran tomorrow!
item.dc:creator: RAB806

item.dc:creator: adell14

item.title: At least two of us are still friends with the DM...
item.description: The simple of it is that one of our members started posting 'haha funny Trump won' memes in our discord as well as other things implying that all lgbt folks are pedophiles. The DM banned him because they don't tolerate that kind of nonsense. Two other members jumped ship afterwards, one because he was friends with the first guy and had more fun in game with him, and the other because he thought he should be banned as well for believing that pedos were hiding amongst lgbt groups. So now our group doesn't have enough players to continue. The two of us that remain are still willing to keep going and are friendly with the DM. He said we'll try to pick things up in January but I'm not sure if we'll pick up new folks or not. I've only been in two D&D games in my whole life, the first one I ended up leaving because of group tensions and now this one is messed up too. *sigh* I don't fault the DM for what they did, I agree with it honestly. I'm just sad that this happened.
item.dc:creator: TalanRhodes

greetings online friends
good movie with these 2 - the wrestler
try the and
gotta love that
mmm hmm
want no part of that at any time
as a guy... yeah, i've done this
yes
as is tradition
no idea
sorry for including this
damn that's a nice bench
real mature, guy who made this
pengin
mortifying
and there you have it
lies
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.dc:creator: YourUncleMolestsCollies

item.title: Thought more people should see this
item.description: Sauce: https://youtu.be/iX3vMJOADlE Youtuber: Led By Donkeys Video Title: TESLA = TRUMP Edit. After reading some of the comments, I just wanted to say and remind everyone that it's important to keep these atrocities in the limelight. If we stop talking about them and give into the harmful rhetoric (by doing nothing), we tip the scales in favor of those that want to surpress human rights. Please dont bury your head in the sand. The least we can do is stay united and keep spreading the word to reach more people. Also watch the video. I only took snippets and it covers events up until the election.
item.dc:creator: PineySweets

item.title: Good Lookin
item.description: Alright, so yesterday’s post somehow managed to make a few people angry on social media. If you're one of them and really want to kick us in the face, here's your chance! Jonathan is coming to Vienna Comic Con this month! Meet him there! https://viecc.com/2024/war-and-peas/

item.title: Pretty cut and dry
item.description: Too easy. For everybody who voted blue, thank you. -I'd like to extend the special thanks to the black community for showing up for everybody. Everybody else, pound sand FP edit: Find me elsewhere. I do a little bit of social media stuff in my spare time. https://linktr.ee/GridSquares
item.dc:creator: VeteranGridSquares

item.title: Tall girl meta at the climbing gym
item.description: Source : https://youtube.com/shorts/PahIRfIT8mc Not the usual cosplay content that I post on Imgur, but I thought that was funny haha. I enjoy climbing a lot even though I am pretty weak (got diagnosed with malnutrition when I was a kid and struggled to build muscle mass my whole life), it's been helping me feel more confident in my strength and slowly build muscles mass. I also thought it would be cool to share that side of me too sometimes. Have a nice day everyone!
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon
